description:
A Solar Sales Representative needs to shortlist premium high-efficiency solar panels for a high-net-worth residential customer proposal. Extract and rank the top 15 monocrystalline silicon modules by efficiency from the California Energy Commission (CEC) Modules database located in the SAM installation directory (/opt/SAM/). Filter for modules where technology contains 'Mono', rated power (Pmp or STC) is at least 380 W, and module efficiency is at least 20.0% (calculated as Pmp / (Area * 10) if an explicit efficiency column is not present). Save the top 15 modules, sorted by efficiency in descending order, to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/premium_modules_report.json.

The JSON structure must exactly match this format:
{
  "query_criteria": {
    "technology": "Mono-c-Si",
    "min_pmp_w": 380,
    "min_efficiency_pct": 20.0
  },
  "total_modules_matching": <integer count of ALL modules matching criteria before selecting top 15>,
  "top_15_modules": [
    {
      "rank": 1,
      "name": "<Full module name>",
      "pmp_w": <power in watts>,
      "efficiency_pct": <efficiency as percentage>,
      "voc_v": <open-circuit voltage>,
      "isc_a": <short-circuit current>,
      "area_m2": <module area in m2>,
      "technology": "<technology string>",
      "bifacial": <0 or 1>,
      "n_series": <number of cells>
    }
  ]
}
